entries.definition:
and, therefore, cannot be seen except by certain people of their
kin (24:58) يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لِيَسْتَأْذِنْكُمُ الَّذِينَ مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُكُمْ وَالَّذِينَ لَمْ يَبْلُغُوا الْحُلُمَ
مِنْكُمْ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ مِنْ قَبْلِ صَلَاةِ الْفَجْرِ وَحِينَ تَضَعُونَ ثِيَابَكُمْ مِنَ الظَّهِيرَةِ وَمِنْ بَعْدِ
صَلَاةِ الْعِشَاءِ you who believe, let your slaves and those
of your family who have not yet reached puberty ask, on three
occasions, your permission [to enter in your presence]: before
the dawn prayer, and when you lay your garments aside at
midday [siesta], and after the evening prayer—[these are] three
times for privacy/nakedness for you II [quasi-pass. part.]
vulnerable, easy to rob, easy to attack, exposed (33:13) يَقُولُونَ إِنَّ
بُيُوتَنَا عَوْرَةٌ saying, ‘Our homes are exposed.’

kin (24:58) يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لِيَسْتَأْذِنْكُمُ الَّذِينَ مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُكُمْ وَالَّذِينَ لَمْ يَبْلُغُوا الْحُلُمَ

صَلَاةِ الْعِشَاءِ you who believe, let your slaves and those

بُيُوتَنَا عَوْرَةٌ saying, ‘Our homes are exposed.’

entries.definition:
ʿ–w–q obstacle, obstruction, impediment, to obstruct, to delay,
to hinder, to incapacitate. Of this root, only الْمُعَوِّقِينَ
ʾal-muʿawwiqīn occurs once in the Qur’an.

مُعَوِّقِين muʿawwiqīn [pl. of act. part. مُعَوِّق muʿawwiq] one who
hinders, one who obstructs (33:18) قَدْ يَعْلَمُ اللَّهُ الْمُعَوِّقِينَ مِنْكُمْ God may
know [take to task] the hinderers among you.
entries.definition_english:
ʿ–w–q obstacle, obstruction, impediment, to obstruct, to delay,
to hinder, to incapacitate. Of this root, only الْمُعَوِّقِينَ
ʾal-muʿawwiqīn occurs once in the Qur’an.

مُعَوِّقِين muʿawwiqīn [pl. of act. part. مُعَوِّق muʿawwiq] one who
hinders, one who obstructs (33:18) قَدْ يَعْلَمُ اللَّهُ الْمُعَوِّقِينَ مِنْكُمْ God may
know [take to task] the hinderers among you.
